description_long: This is a modern swivel chair with a deep blue upholstered seat and backrest, designed for comfort and style. The seat features a wide, gently contoured back that curves smoothly into integrated armrests, providing ergonomic support. The chair sits atop a sturdy black metal base with five spokes, each ending in a caster wheel for easy mobility. The central support column is robust and likely made of metal, supporting the seat securely while allowing for rotation. The upholstery appears to be a soft, matte fabric, giving the chair a plush and inviting appearance. There are no visible adjustment levers or mechanisms, suggesting a fixed height and tilt.
description: A modern blue upholstered swivel chair with integrated armrests and a black five-spoke caster base, designed for comfort and mobility.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide, curved backrest, integrated armrests, and the open seat area.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the chair's deep seat, sloped backrest, and the thickness of the cushioning.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the smooth, rounded back of the chair and the full width of the backrest.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the seat's depth and the continuous curve of the armrest and backrest.
attribute_central_support_column: A black metal cylindrical column, fixed, supporting the seat and connecting to the five-spoke base.
attribute_seat_back_design: Wide, gently curved, mid-height backrest with integrated armrests, upholstered in blue fabric, smooth and unpatterned.
attribute_armrest_style: Integrated armrests, smoothly curving from the backrest, upholstered in the same blue fabric, forming a continuous contour with the seat.
